subcodes.first_line: The Primal Point, after traversing the realms of earthly dominion, appeared adorned with the seal of finality, and from this union emerged manifold forms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نقطه بدئیه بعد از سیر در عوالم ملکیه بطراز ختمیه ظاهر شد و از ترکیب آن اشکال
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @symbolism, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @exhortations and counsels, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
